name: Tanvi Gupta
summary: Tanvi talks about her dream of flying in the IAF, passing the CPSS (Computerised Pilot Selection System), and her interview with the Board President.
data: Going to 1 AFSB Dehradun is an experience I will never forget. The scenic view of the Himalayas kept me motivated. The psychological tests and GTO tasks were highly interactive, and I made sure to be a team player. On the third day, I had my personal interview. The Board President was very friendly and asked about my family background, college projects, and interest in military aviation. The CPSS test took place on Day 5, where we sat in a cockpit simulator and had to clear standard speed and coordinate tests. Keep your head high and believe in yourself!
